title: More Than Apples
description: This mod adds new apples and carrot and some unique effects that grant stronger buffs than normal golden foods and It also introduces a new biome and a set of new advancements
body:
This mod adds two new apples and a carrot that grant stronger buffs than the Golden Apple or Golden Carrot. Diamond Apple and Netherite Apple can be crafted, while enchanted versions can only be found in chests or structures.            

More Than Apples requires Fabric Loader , Fabric API and TerraBlender.

What’s New?
🍎 New Foods



Green Apple – Grants the Luck effect when eaten
Test_Apple – Can be obtained from fishing. eating it grants the Call of Apple effect.
Diamond Apple – Grants stronger buffs than the Golden Apple. Can be crafted or found in loot chests and structures
Enchanted Diamond Apple – A rarer version that can only be obtained from loot chests or structures
Diamond Carrot – An upgraded version of the Golden Carrot, providing better buffs (:



Netherite Apple – Even more powerful, offering extended resistance, regeneration, and protection against some debuffs. still can crafted or found in loot chests and structures
Enchanted Netherite Apple – A very rare, uncraftable version with the strongest effects in the mod and more protection against some debuffs you can found in loot chests and structures

✨ New Effects
Darkness Immunity, Slowness Immunity, Mining Fatigue Immunity, Freezing Resistance,
Call of Apple (A special effect that allows you to fish for apples anywhere) 🌳 New Biome
Aapple Grove, Golden Apple Orchard, Frosty Apple
🌲 New Tree Type
Apple Tree, Golden Apple Tree, Test_Tree, Frosty Tree

![appleabar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de8fb3b2f56f019043acbf01d6a92d41283e9efe.png)
Apple Barrel -  Crafted with any 4 planks and any 2 apples
